  • Uses of WriterSerializer in org.apache.juneau.marshall

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall that return WriterSerializer
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected WriterSerializer
    MarshallingContext.getBeanToStringSerializer()
    Returns the serializer to use for serializing beans when using the MarshallingSession.convertToType(Object, Class) and related methods.

  • Uses of WriterSerializer in org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections with parameters of type WriterSerializer
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    MarshalledList.toString(WriterSerializer serializer)
    Serializes this list to a string using the specified serializer.
    String
    MarshalledMap.toString(WriterSerializer serializer)
    Serializes this map to a string using the specified serializer.

    Subclasses of WriterSerializer in org.apache.juneau.marshall.html
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    HtmlDocSerializer
    Serializes POJOs to HTTP responses as HTML documents.
    class 
    HtmlSchemaDocSerializer
    Serializes POJO metamodels to HTML.
    class 
    HtmlSchemaSerializer
    Serializes POJO metamodels to HTML.
    static class 
    HtmlSchemaSerializer.Readable
    Default serializer, with whitespace.
    static class 
    HtmlSchemaSerializer.Simple
    Default serializer, single quotes, simple mode.
    static class 
    HtmlSchemaSerializer.SimpleReadable
    Default serializer, single quotes, simple mode, with whitespace.
    class 
    HtmlSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to HTML.
    static class 
    HtmlSerializer.Sq
    Default serializer, single quotes.
    static class 
    HtmlSerializer.SqReadable
    Default serializer, single quotes, whitespace added.
    class 
    HtmlStrippedDocSerializer
    Serializes POJOs to HTTP responses as stripped HTML.

  • Uses of WriterSerializer in org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena

    Subclasses of WriterSerializer in org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    JsonLdSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to JSON-LD format.
    class 
    N3Serializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to N3 (Notation3) format.
    class 
    NQuadsSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to N-Quads format.
    class 
    NTripleSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to N-Triples notation.
    class 
    RdfJsonSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to RDF/JSON notation.
    class 
    RdfSerializer
    Serializes POJOs to RDF.
    class 
    RdfXmlAbbrevSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to RDF/XML-Abbrev (abbreviated XML notation).
    class 
    RdfXmlSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to RDF/XML (standard XML notation).
    class 
    TriGSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to TriG format.
    class 
    TriXSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to TriX (XML) format.
    class 
    TurtleSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to Turtle format.

    Serializes POJO models to Markdown (fragment mode: tables and lists).

    OpenApiSerializer

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    PlainTextSerializer
    Serializes POJOs to plain text using just the toString() method on the serialized object.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    WriterSerializer
    WriterSerializer.Builder.build()
     
    final WriterSerializer
    WriterSerializer.println(Object o)
    Convenience method for serializing an object and sending it to STDOUT.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer that return types with arguments of type WriterSerializer
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<WriterSerializer>
    SerializerSet.getWriterSerializer(String acceptHeader)
    Same as SerializerSet.getSerializer(String), but casts it to a WriterSerializer.
    Optional<WriterSerializer>
    SerializerSet.getWriterSerializer(MediaType mediaType)
    Same as SerializerSet.getSerializer(MediaType), but casts it to a WriterSerializer.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static WriterSerializerSession.Builder<?>

  • Uses of WriterSerializer in org.apache.juneau.marshall.uon

    Subclasses of WriterSerializer in org.apache.juneau.marshall.uon
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    UonSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to UON (a notation for URL-encoded query parameter values).
    static class 
    UonSerializer.Encoding
    Equivalent to UonSerializer.create().encoding().build();.
    static class 
    UonSerializer.Readable
    Equivalent to UonSerializer.create().ws().build();.

  • Uses of WriterSerializer in org.apache.juneau.marshall.urlencoding

    Subclasses of WriterSerializer in org.apache.juneau.marshall.urlencoding
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    UrlEncodingSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to URL-encoded notation with UON-encoded values (a notation for URL-encoded query paramter values).
    static class 
    UrlEncodingSerializer.Expanded
    Equivalent to UrlEncodingSerializer.create().expandedParams().build();.
    static class 
    UrlEncodingSerializer.PlainText
    Equivalent to UrlEncodingSerializer.create().plainTextParts().build();.
    static class 
    UrlEncodingSerializer.Readable
    Equivalent to UrlEncodingSerializer.create().useWhitespace().build();.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    XmlDocSerializer
    Serializes POJOs to HTTP responses as XML.
    static class 
    XmlDocSerializer.Ns
    Default serializer without namespaces.
    class 
    XmlSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to XML.
    static class 
    XmlSerializer.Ns
    Default serializer without namespaces.
    static class 
    XmlSerializer.NsSq
    Default serializer without namespaces, single quotes.
    static class 
    XmlSerializer.NsSqReadable
    Default serializer without namespaces, single quotes, with whitespace.
    static class 
    XmlSerializer.Sq
    Default serializer, single quotes.
    static class 
    XmlSerializer.SqReadable
    Default serializer, single quotes, whitespace added.
